saints.name: Apostle and Evangelist John the Theologian

troparion.text: O beloved Apostle of Christ our God, / come quickly to deliver your helpless people. / He on whose breast you leaned, will accept you as intercessor. / Entreat Him, O Theologian, to disperse the clouds of darkness, / granting us peace and great mercy!

kontakion.text: Who shall declare your greatness,  /  O virgin disciple, /  for you pour forth wonders and are a source of healings, /  and pray for our souls as theologian and friend of Christ.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Arsenius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

kontakion.text: You shone from Rome as a great sun and reached the royal city,1 most blessed one,  / enlightening it by your words and deeds, and dispersing the darkness of foolishness.  / Therefore, we honor you, O Venerable Arsenios, glory of the Fathers.

saints.name: Venerable Arsenius the Lover-of-Labor of the Kiev Far Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Arsenius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Venerable Pimen the Ascetic of the Kiev Far Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Pimen, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
